sentences.arabic: الصِّدْقُ صِفَةٌ ضَرُورِيَّةٌ لِكُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ يُرِيدُ رِضَا اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ.
sentences.translation: Iskrenost je neophodna osobina za svakog muslimana koji želi Allahovo zadovoljstvo.
sentences.translationEn: Honesty is a necessary quality for every Muslim who wants the pleasure of Allah the Almighty.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ: «عَلَيْكُمْ بِالصِّدْقِ، فَإِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ، وَإِنَّ الْبِرَّ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ، رَقْمُ ٦٠٩٤].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Budite iskreni, jer iskrenost vodi ka dobročinstvu, a dobročinstvo vodi u Džennet' [Buhari, Knjiga o adabu, br. 6094].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'You must be truthful, for truthfulness leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise' [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of Manners, No. 6094].

sentences.arabic: الصَّادِقُ يَنْالُ ثِقَةَ النَّاسِ وَاحْتِرَامَهُمْ فِي حَيَاتِهِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Iskrena osoba stiče povjerenje i poštovanje ljudi u svom svakodnevnom životu.
sentences.translationEn: A truthful person gains people's trust and respect in his daily life.

sentences.arabic: أَمَّا الْكَذِبُ فَهُوَ طَرِيقٌ إِلَى الشَّرِّ وَالْمَشَاكِلِ.
sentences.translation: Što se tiče laži, ona je put ka zlu i problemima.
sentences.translationEn: As for lying, it is a path to evil and problems.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، كَانَ الصَّحَابَةُ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ يَصْدُقُونَ فِي كُلِّ أَقْوَالِهِمْ وَأَفْعَالِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga su ashabi, radijallahu anhum, bili iskreni u svim svojim riječima i djelima.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, the Companions, may Allah be pleased with them, were truthful in all their words and actions.
